channel.title: Comments on: Full Sail Brewing: LTD 04, Ep. 158
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: And Paul, regarding your comments about seasonal and special releases: I used to be similarly bummed when a seasonal or special went away. But over the last year, I've come to buy ONLY such beers. In fact, I'm greatly enjoying Alaskan's new spring seasonal (a fabulous black IPA) as I write this; it's Alaskan's first spring seasonal ever. Extreme variety is now my beer drinking focus, and American brewing, as you point out, is the world epicenter of such excitement. Cheers!
item.content:encoded:
And Paul, regarding your comments about seasonal and special releases:
I used to be similarly bummed when a seasonal or special went away. But over the last year, I’ve come to buy ONLY such beers. In fact, I’m greatly enjoying Alaskan’s new spring seasonal (a fabulous black IPA) as I write this; it’s Alaskan’s first spring seasonal ever. Extreme variety is now my beer drinking focus, and American brewing, as you point out, is the world epicenter of such excitement. Cheers!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Tom! I tell John all the time to go geeky whenever he can, not only do our viewers like it, but I learn a heck of a lot in the process!!!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Tom! I tell John all the time to go geeky whenever he can, not only do our viewers like it, but I learn a heck of a lot in the process!!!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: I had this beer during its 2011 release. I recall it having an incredibly dry finish, and I really liked it. Thanks for the brewing geek talk; it's one reason why I enjoy your vids.
item.content:encoded: I had this beer during its 2011 release. I recall it having an incredibly dry finish, and I really liked it. Thanks for the brewing geek talk; it’s one reason why I enjoy your vids.
